title: esenbeckia runyonii
intro: Esenbeckia runyonii, also known as "Willow-leaf" or "Yellow Bird's Flower", is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, classified as a member of the Rutaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, which have been attributed to the presence of limonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Esenbeckia runyonii include its ability to reduce fever, relieve digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. Esenbeckia runyonii is often prepared for medicinal use in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically administered orally to take advantage of its therapeutic properties.
